summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 6 features: Transaction Matching, Dispute Chat, and Force Approve. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI components verified working correctly.

backend: POST /api/admin/payments/{pop_id}/match with mismatched code → status 'verification_failed' with specific reason
POST /api/admin/payments/{pop_id}/match with mismatched amount → status 'verification_failed' with amount details
POST /api/admin/payments/{pop_id}/force-approve with reason → overrides failed status to 'approved' with audit trail
POST /api/admin/payments/{pop_id}/force-approve with short reason (<5 chars) → fails with 400
POST /api/admin/payments/{pop_id}/reject with reason → rejected status + customer notification
POST /api/disputes/message (customer) → creates dispute message linked to POP transaction
POST /api/disputes/message (admin) → creates admin reply with customer notification
GET /api/disputes/{pop_id}/messages → returns chat history for that transaction
GET /api/admin/disputes → returns all disputes with message counts and last message
Audit trail created on match operations
frontend: Admin Dashboard has 8 tabs (Pending, Stock, Reconcile, Defaulters, Payments, Invoices, Feedback, Messages)
Payments tab shows 'Match' button on each POP card
Payments tab shows 'Force Approve' button only on verification_failed POPs
Payments tab shows 'FAILED' badge on verification_failed POPs
Payments tab shows decline reason with mismatch details
Match dialog has Customer Entry (read-only) showing code and amount
Match dialog has Admin Entry (YOUR RECORDS) with transaction code and amount inputs
Match dialog has 'Verify Match' button with explanation text
Force Approve dialog has reason textarea with placeholder
Force Approve dialog shows audit warning: 'An audit trail will be recorded'
Force Approve dialog shows original decline reason
Force Approve dialog has 'Force Approve Payment' button
Messages tab shows disputes list with message count badges
Messages tab shows last message preview and sender name
Admin dispute chat dialog shows message history with admin/customer alignment
Admin dispute chat has reply input and send button
Admin dispute chat has 'Resolve & Force Approve' quick action button
Customer UserInvoices shows 'Raise Dispute' button on verification_failed POPs
Customer UserInvoices shows decline reason on failed POPs
Customer dispute chat allows sending messages and viewing admin replies

seed_data_creation: Created admin session 'test-admin-session-13514af2' for admin-user-1774273147 (mavin@5dm.africa). Created user session 'test-user-session-bb6c7465' for user_5463750c8ece (Joe Goga). Created multiple test invoices and POPs for testing match/mismatch/force-approve/dispute scenarios.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 6 features are fully functional: (1) Transaction Matching: Admin enters code+amount, system compares with customer's POP. Match → approved, Mismatch → verification_failed with specific reason. (2) Force Approve: Admin can override failed transactions with mandatory reason (min 5 chars), creates audit trail. (3) Dispute Chat: Customer can raise dispute on failed POPs, admin can reply, notifications sent to both parties. (4) Admin Dashboard now has 8 tabs including Messages tab for disputes. (5) Pending payments endpoint returns both 'pending' and 'verification_failed' statuses. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration6_features.py.

transaction_matching.frontend: Match dialog with Customer Entry (read-only) + Admin Entry inputs - WORKING

force_approve.frontend: Force Approve dialog with reason textarea and audit warning - WORKING

reject_payment.frontend: Reject button on POP cards - WORKING

dispute_chat.frontend: Admin and Customer dispute chat dialogs with message history - WORKING

admin_disputes_list.frontend: Messages tab with dispute list, message count badges, last message preview - WORKING

pending_payments_endpoint.backend: GET /api/admin/payments/pending returns pending AND verification_failed - WORKING
pending_payments_endpoint.frontend: Payments tab shows both pending and failed POPs - WORKING

admin_tabs.frontend: 8 tabs confirmed (Pending, Stock, Reconcile, Defaulters, Payments, Invoices, Feedback, Messages) - WORKING

customer_raise_dispute.frontend: UserInvoices shows 'Raise Dispute' button on verification_failed POPs - WORKING
